response.overview: "The Boy on the Moon" tells the story of a lone dreamer who drifts through the endless night, watching over the stars above. Isolated in the vastness of space, he finds solace in his dreams—each one a world of his own creation. But on one particular night, something changes. In what seems like an ordinary dream, a simple touch shatters the illusion, leaving behind a lingering feeling he doesn’t understand. For the first time, a dream feels real. And without knowing why, he begins to search for it again.
response.title: Boy on the Moon
